_comment: Durable in-repo provenance sidecar for pipeline-hero trace lines whose verbatim text lived only in gitignored working docs (docs/dev/*, absent from a clean clone). Each entry records the verbatim rendered text, the original gitignored origin path it was harvested from, and the commit that harvest belongs to. Referenced by .github/assets/demo-trace.json via source_ref=this file and source_locator=<key>. Condensation lines (s04/s07/s09) are stylized single-line condensations derived from their origin doc, not verbatim substrings of it.

s02.text: Document how the README hero demo is captured and why it is authentic

s03.text: every visible line traces to a real /spec→/dev→/close→/commit→/push run artifact

s06.text: Built a deterministic paper-substrate animated-SVG demo system for the README hero
